nasb.text: If a river rages, he is not alarmed; He is confident, though the Jordan rushes to his mouth.

esv.text: Behold, if the river is turbulent he is not frightened; he is confident though Jordan rushes against his mouth.

cnv.text: 江河氾濫，牠毫不慌張， 約旦河的水漲到牠的口邊，牠還是安然。

ccb.text: 河水泛滥，它不惊惧； 约旦河涨到它口边，它也无忧。
